definition: The fees established in OAR 812-003-0142 that contractors must pay for new license applications, renewals, and reissues; as of the 2024–2025 phased schedule, renewal/reissue fees are $400 (effective 2024-07-01) and new-application fees are $400 (effective 2025-07-01), with a prior $325 new-application amount before that date.
